g.text: 1. Root pg2: 50 <= cell[0].key=50, go left pg3
2. Leaf pg3: scan cells, rowid=50 found at slot 2
BONUS: if row IS in internal node → 1 page read
B+tree always descends to leaf: never fewer than 2
Range Scan — WHERE name BETWEEN Alice AND Dave
1. Descend tree once to leaf pg11 (Alice)
2. Scan pg11 forward: Alice, Bob, Carol
Never re-ascends tree: O(matching leaf pages)
DATA in ALL nodes — internal + leaf
DATA only in LEAF nodes — leaves form linked list
Separator keys ONLY — zero row data stored here
Full row record per cell (varint rowid + payload)
Full row record per cell (varint rowid + payload)
